title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: AWS Developers explains foundational IAM concepts through analogies (bouncer, employee badge vs. visitor pass) and advocates for least privilege as the primary security principle. The video covers users, roles, policies, and warns against embedding access keys in code, with IAM Access Analyzer as a tool to discover required permissions.
